entity.description: Hold on tight! It’s time to take a spin on the LEGO Friends Candy & Cupcake Ferris Wheel. Join Nova, Zac and Liann as they enjoy the fairground ride. Try out the ring-toss game where there’s a donut, a narwhal and a bee toy to win! Stop for a snack or visit the cotton candy stand. Then get ready for another ride on the colorful Ferris wheel!

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Swoop into playtime with this Ferris wheel building set for girls and boys which includes 3 minidolls, a ring-toss game and lots of fun accessories.

product.description: Encourage kids to get creative as they celebrate 2 holidays with this awesome LEGO Festival Calendar (40678), a great seasonal gift for boys and girls aged 10 and up. Sparking creativity, this LEGO calendar building kit offers 2 fun building options that represent 2 important holidays — Lunar New Year and the Dragon Boat Festival. The Lunar New Year building option includes 2 minifigures and lantern accessories. The Dragon Boat Festival option features a beautiful dragon’s head and tail, plus water elements. Other meaningful elements include firecrackers and red envelopes, and the calendar rotates so kids can display the correct date. Once complete, the calendar makes an eye-catching piece of LEGO decor that can be displayed proudly in any room. A thoughtful present for kids, teens and adults, this building set makes a great Lunar New Year gift or Dragon Boat Festival gift, as well as a fun way to celebrate the occasions with friends and family.

metaData.Key Information: Kids aged 10 and up can mark 2 important seasonal holidays with a calendar that celebrates Lunar New Year and the Dragon Boat Festival.

product.name: LEGO 40678 Festival Calendar

product.description: Builders can immerse themselves in tradition as they create the money tree model and discover its awesome details. In Chinese culture it has long been believed that a money tree brings abundance, prosperity and good luck and, true to this belief, this LEGO tree is adorned with riches and rewards including 20 tangerines, 14 red envelopes and 10 coins. Once it’s complete, the model becomes an eye-catching piece of Lunar New Year decor that can be displayed in any room or used as a table centerpiece.

metaData.Key Information:
This item is a Jan 2025 release and available for pre-order from 26 Dec onwards. Item will be delivered to you by 2nd week of Jan.
Encourage pretend play with the LEGO Money Tree building set for kids, whose imaginations will grow as they assemble this cool seasonal decor.

product.description: Feel creativity flourish as you craft a colorful bouquet of LEGO tulips. Build each bloom and marvel at the authentic details and colors - you’ll discover vibrant green buds, purple closed tulips and red, yellow, pink and orange opened tulips, plus green leaves and adjustable stems for customization. Once you’ve finished building, display the bouquet proudly as flower decor.

metaData.Key Information: Creativity flourishes with the LEGO Botanicals Tulip Bouquet, a building kit for adults that becomes gorgeous everlasting flower decor.

product.description: Head to the amusement park to enjoy thrilling rides with 3 different LEGO sets. Grab an ice cream before jumping on a Ferris wheel and spinning around! Then buy a ticket for the UFO ride, strap yourself in and enjoy more spinning action or take a seat on the carousel and swing out as it quickly rotates. What will you build? The choice is yours with this 3 in 1 playset.

metaData.Key Information: LEGO Creator 3 in 1 set lets kids ages 8 and up build a Ferris wheel toy with 4 minifigures, then rebuild it into a UFO ride or carousel.

product.description: Meet Paisley – a shy girl with a big imagination! Join the fun as she relaxes with her family at home. Make a snack in the kitchen or head upstairs to the bedroom that Paisley shares with little sister Ella. Join Paisley in the garden where she loves to compose music for her guitar. Remember to say hello to pet bunny Melody. Open her hutch and feed her a carrot. What a lovely way to spend the day!

metaData.Key Information: Inspire creative role play for kids aged 4 and up as they build and explore this learn-to-build LEGO Friends Paisley’s House toy building set.

product.description: Celebrate a revolutionary era of video games with this near 1:1 scale LEGO model of the original Game Boy from Nintendo. Recreate authentic details, from the Game Pak slot to the iconic +Control Pad, with LEGO bricks. Insert either the Super Mario Land or The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening Game Pak and lenticular screen (or Nintendo start screen) and display your creation on the stand.

metaData.Key Information: Create a detailed LEGO brick-built replica of the original Game Boy system from Nintendo with this collectible building set for adults.

product.description: Build up a storm with this big box of classic LEGO bricks in 33 different colors. With lots of different windows and doors, along with other special pieces to inspire you, you can really run with your imagination. With some ideas to get you started, this set provides the perfect creative toolkit for budding builders of all ages to enjoy some classic LEGO construction. It comes in a convenient plastic storage box and is an ideal supplement to any existing LEGO collection

product.description: Olly and Paisley love hanging out together. And luckily, they live right next door to each other! Would you like to visit them? Enjoy afternoon tea at Olly’s house and check out his fashion designs, then head over to Paisley’s house to play guitar. You can explore all the different rooms in their houses, meet their families and pets and have fun in the tree house that sits between their 2 homes.

metaData.Key Information: The LEGO Friends Olly and Paisley's Family Houses set is a role-play building toy for kids with 5 mini-dolls, a micro-doll and 2 pet figures.

product.description:
Preschool LEGO building toy – with its own storage box!
Inside the sturdy toy box, you’ll find inspiration and ideas to engage and excite young minds. There’s a window, 1-2-3 number bricks and, of course, an amazing assortment of LEGO bricks in a rainbow of cool colors. As parents and carers join in connecting the bricks and pieces to make imaginative models, they share precious developmental milestones with their little builders.

metaData.Key Information: Introduce budding builders to creative play and the developmental benefits it brings with this first LEGO DUPLO set and toy box for toddlers.
